tasks.dev:oidc: AUTH=oidc OIDC_DISCOVERY_URL=http://localhost:8080/realms/profilarr/.well-known/openid-configuration OIDC_CLIENT_ID=profilarr OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=secret deno run -A scripts/dev.ts
tasks.dev:server: DENO_ENV=development PORT=6969 HOST=0.0.0.0 APP_BASE_PATH=./dist/dev PARSER_HOST=localhost PARSER_PORT=5000 VITE_PLATFORM=linux-amd64 VITE_CHANNEL=dev deno run -A npm:vite dev
tasks.dev:parser: cd src/services/parser && dotnet watch run --urls http://localhost:5000
tasks.build: APP_BASE_PATH=./dist/build deno run -A npm:vite build && deno compile --no-check --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-run --allow-sys --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output dist/build/profilarr dist/build/mod.ts
tasks.build:windows: APP_BASE_PATH=./dist/build deno run -A npm:vite build && deno compile --no-check --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-run --allow-sys --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output dist/windows/profilarr.exe dist/build/mod.ts
tasks.build:standalone: APP_BASE_PATH=./dist/build VITE_CHANNEL=stable deno run -A npm:vite build && deno compile --no-check --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-run --allow-sys --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output dist/release/profilarr dist/build/mod.ts && cp dist/build/server.js dist/release/server.js && cp -r dist/build/static dist/release/static && rm -f src/services/parser/Directory.Build.props && dotnet publish src/services/parser/Parser.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o dist/parser-out/ && mv dist/parser-out/Parser dist/release/profilarr-parser && git checkout src/services/parser/Directory.Build.props
tasks.build:standalone:windows: APP_BASE_PATH=./dist/build VITE_PLATFORM=windows-amd64 VITE_CHANNEL=stable deno run -A npm:vite build && deno compile --no-check --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-run --allow-sys --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output dist/release-win/profilarr.exe dist/build/mod.ts && cp dist/build/server.js dist/release-win/server.js && cp -r dist/build/static dist/release-win/static && rm -f src/services/parser/Directory.Build.props && dotnet publish src/services/parser/Parser.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o dist/parser-out-win/ && mv dist/parser-out-win/Parser.exe dist/release-win/profilarr-parser.exe && git checkout src/services/parser/Directory.Build.props
tasks.check: deno task check:server && deno task check:client
tasks.publish:api: deno task bundle:api && cd packages/profilarr-api && deno publish
